name: Integrated Antenatal, Labor, Delivery, Newborn and post natal care card
description: Integrated Antenatal, Labor, Delivery, Newborn and post natal care card Translated from Bahmni

validators.message: Please enter the telephone number in the correct format e.g 0993888198 thats is 10 digits

questions.label: History of 3 or More Consecutive Spontaneous Abortion
Last Pregnancy: Hospital Admission for Hypertension or Preeclampsia/Eclampsia
Previous Surgery on Reproductive Tract? (Myomectomy, removal of Septum, Fistula Repair, Cone Biopsy, C/S, Repaired Rapture, Cervical Circlage)
Isoimmunization (Rh -ve) in current or in previous pregnancy?
Systolic >140 mm/hg and/or Diastolic Blood Pressure 90mmHg
Known substance abuse (including heavy alcohol drinking and smoking)?
Any other severe medical disease or condition (TB, HIV, Ca, DVT...)?
